S.FORM: == kapulungan a ngangan nu Sakizaya atu Taluku(Tayan, Sejek) == Sayiun, Sayong Mayong (Mayomayong檳榔神) Watan Awi, Yawi Nuwa Tuku Kala Tayan Dawa, Lawa Bakuay
S.PHON: == kapur~ɾuŋan a ŋaŋan nu sakizaja atu tar~ɾuku(tajan, səjək) == sajiun, sajoŋ majoŋ (majomajoŋ***) watan awi, jawi nuwa tuku kar~ɾa tajan dawa, r~ɾawa bakuaj

S.PHON: == kapur~ɾuŋan a ŋaŋan nu sakizaja atu tar~ɾuku(tajan, səjək) == sajiun, sajoŋ majoŋ (majomajoŋ***) watan awi, jawi nuwa tuku kar~ɾa tajan dawa, r~ɾawa bakuaj
